Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

Class PrimitiveNumberVerifierImpl<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifier<S,V,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractComparableVerifier<S,V,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractNumberVerifier<PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T>,PrimitiveNumberValidator<T>,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.PrimitiveNumberVerifierImpl<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the value being verified
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleComparableVerifier<PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T>,T>, ExtensibleNumberVerifier<PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T>,T>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T>,T>, ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier<PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T>,T>, PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T>
public final class PrimitiveNumberVerifierImpl<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>> extends AbstractNumberVerifier<PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T>,PrimitiveNumberValidator<T>,T> implements PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T>
Default implementation of PrimitiveNumberVerifier.
